description: Los Negros was the main armed wing of the Beltrán Leyva Cartel in Mexico, formed in 2003 to support the Sinaloa Cartel against the Gulf Cartel and Los Zetas. After the split between the Beltrán Leyva brothers and Joaquín 'El Chapo' Guzmán, Los Negros allied with Los Zetas. Led by Édgar Valdez Villarreal 'La Barbie', the group was involved in drug trafficking, murder, and extortion across multiple Mexican states. Following Valdez's capture in 2010, the group fragmented into independent cells.
